evals.name: plain-resync
evals.prompt: Pull the latest design system tokens into the theme and make sure everything is still in order.
evals.expected_output: Runs npm run tokens:sync (which builds the design system, validates the contract, and copies dist/tokens.flat.css to assets/design-tokens.css verbatim), runs npm test, and reports a clean sync without hand-editing any generated file.
assertions: assets/design-tokens.css is byte-identical to ../design-system/dist/tokens.flat.css (synced verbatim, no hand edits)
npm test passes in the theme

evals.name: upstream-revalue-heading
evals.prompt: We bumped the heading text role's font size to 24px in the design system. Update the theme so it picks that up.
evals.expected_output: Runs the sync, sees the contract fail with a wrong-value error (expected 22px, got 24px), updates the expected value in scripts/design-tokens-contract.mjs to 24px, re-syncs so assets/design-tokens.css carries the 24px literal, and passes npm test. Does not hand-edit design-tokens.css and does not revert the design system.
assertions: assets/design-tokens.css is byte-identical to ../design-system/dist/tokens.flat.css (synced verbatim, no hand edits)
design system source still says 24px (source of truth was not reverted)
npm test passes in the theme

evals.name: upstream-rename-hero
evals.prompt: The design system renamed the `hero` text role to `display`. Sync the theme with that change.
evals.expected_output: Updates the four hero entries in scripts/design-tokens-contract.mjs to the display names, re-points the h1 mapping in snippets/design-system-bridge.liquid at --text-role-display-*, greps the whole theme for stale var(--text-role-hero-*) references and updates blocks/split-hero.liquid too, re-syncs successfully, and passes npm test. The block update is the discriminating step: the contract alone does not guard block-spent tokens.
assertions: assets/design-tokens.css is byte-identical to ../design-system/dist/tokens.flat.css (synced verbatim, no hand edits)
contract lists the four --text-role-display-* tokens and no --text-role-hero-*
bridge maps h1 to --text-role-display-* with no stale hero references
blocks/split-hero.liquid updated to --text-role-display-* with no stale --text-role-hero-* (a stale var() is silent)
npm test passes in the theme
